title: Vampire heals half attack damage dealt

card.rawText: This creature heals for 1/2 of the Atk damage it inflicts during battle.

plan.title: Vampire heals half attack damage dealt
plan.summary: Vampire starts damaged, deals deterministic attack damage, then heals half of the actual attack damage rounded up.

notes: Set Vampire current HP to 50 before battle.
Vampire has SPD 9 and should strike before the test defender.

steps: Set Vampire as player_1 primary and test defender as player_2 primary.
Resolve battle where Vampire hits with forced rolls.
Apply 8 actual attack damage to the defender.
Resolve Vampire healing for half of the attack damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Vampire heals above damaged starting HP

manualVerification: Repeat with odd actual damage to confirm CEIL rounding.
riskNotes: Uses the same damage-dealt heal route as Blood of the Bat, but with the source creature as the healer.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Vampire's self-heal from attack damage dealt.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
